name: compliance-radar
title: Sensitivity & Compliance Radar
subtitle: framework coverage, risk exposure & control gaps
description: A compliance showcase — a framework-coverage radar, a sensitivity donut, a control-coverage heatmap, a risk-vs-exposure scatter, and findings by severity.

dataAccesses.name: CompKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct),1) AS coverage, SUM(CASE WHEN severity='High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_findings, COUNT(DISTINCT framework) AS frameworks, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN sensitivity<>'Public' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),0) AS sensitive_pct FROM v_compliance_master

dataAccesses.name: FrameworkCoverage
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT framework, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct),0) AS coverage FROM v_compliance_master GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: SensitivityMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_compliance_master GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: ControlGrid
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT domain, control, ROUND(AVG(coverage_pct),0) AS coverage FROM v_control_coverage GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: RiskExposure
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT entity, exposure_score AS exposure, risk_score AS risk, record_count AS records FROM v_risk_exposure ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 40

dataAccesses.name: FindingsBySeverity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT severity, COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_compliance_finding GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Sensitive Data
kpis.info: Share of assets classified above Public.

panels.title: Coverage by Framework
panels.info: Control coverage across each regulatory framework.
